title: astragalus acanthocarpus
intro: Astragalus acanthocarpus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of perennial legume plant native to China, Mongolia, and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its adaptogenic properties, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus acanthocarpus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Astragalus acanthocarpus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be consumed as a capsule or powder in herbal supplements.
